changes.value:
Swap coreml-rs for objc2-core-ml ecosystem.

- [ ] Remove `coreml-rs = "0.5.4"`
- [ ] Remove `ndarray = "0.15"`
- [ ] Add `objc2 = "0.6"`, `objc2-core-ml = "0.3"`, `objc2-foundation = "0.3"`, `block2 = "0.6"`
- [ ] Keep `half` crate for f16 conversion
- [ ] Verify version compatibility with existing objc2 in lockfile
- [ ] cargo check -p ane-embedding
